info.title: Fortress Reonomy Scraper
info.description: Reproduces MC Reonomy workflows R1 (industrial property list builder for Agent 2) and R2 (per-property owner skip-trace). Feeds Call Tools bulk CSV and Salesforce Lead upserts. Mason's immutable filters (15k+ SF industrial only, exclude self-storage/strip/hotel/office) enforced server-side.

post.summary: Build an industrial property list matching Mason's criteria. Auto-applies exclude_keywords and dedupes against a CK call list if provided. Output rows map directly to Call Tools CSV (first_name,last_name,company,address,city,state,zip,phone) and Salesforce Lead (Company=owner, Record Type=Fortress Industrial, CK_List_Origin__c=campaign tag).

property_types.description: Only industrial subtypes allowed per Mason spec.

min_size_sf.description: Immutable 15k floor per Mason. User may raise for tighter list.

dedupe_against.description: Optional CK list rows { phone, address, entity } for dedupe. Rows tagged _dupe=true are excluded from new_count.

post.summary: Per-property owner skip-trace. Run for each R1 row whose owner_phone+owner_email are empty. Returns status ∈ {FOUND, MAIL_ONLY, SOS_NEEDED, NOT_FOUND}. FOUND→append phone to Call Tools CSV. MAIL_ONLY→mail campaign bucket. SOS_NEEDED→drives Google Secretary of State workflow (search /searxng with query \"[entity] LLC [state] secretary of state\").
